name: Submariner Date
description:
The Blue Dial Submariner is the boldest expression of Rolex's most iconic model. Where the black dial whispers authority, the blue speaks with confidence. The deep gradient blue dial — sometimes called 'Smurf' in collector circles — catches light in a way that turns heads without trying.

Featuring the same unidirectional rotating bezel with blue Cerachrom insert, the color coordination between dial and bezel creates a cohesive, striking aesthetic. On the wrist, this watch doesn't just tell time — it tells your story.
descriptionShort: The bold Submariner variant. Deep blue dial and Cerachrom bezel — the collector's choice.
keyPoints: Deep blue gradient dial — the 'Smurf' colorway
One of Rolex's most sought-after variants
seoTitle: Rolex Submariner Date Blue Dial | Artemis Watches Montreal
seoDescription: Shop the Rolex Submariner Date (Blue Dial) at Artemis — Montreal's premier luxury watch destination. Premium range, 30-day guarantee, free shipping. $1,150 CAD.
